title: Cloud misconfiguration could expose regulated data
statement: Storage, IAM, or logging drift in the production AWS account could expose customer data or delay incident response.
treatment_plan: Enable preventive IaC checks, increase review coverage, and automate evidence collection for storage and IAM controls.

inherent.notes: Historically noisy area with direct customer data exposure.

residual.notes: Residual score assumes weekly drift detection remains healthy.
